creator: squat@squat.no
text:
Created attachment 149028
Patch against current ports as of 2014-11-03 (without removal of -Os).

Update net/miniupnpd to version 1.9 from 2014-10-27.

Should the patch against miniupnpd Makefile still contain the

--CFLAGS ?= -pipe -Os
-+CFLAGS ?= -pipe

part? If so let me know, and I will submit a new patch without removing the whole patch-Makefile.

The release includes improvements to NAT-PMP and IPv6 implementations and is the first release (there has been some daily snapshots) in one and a half year.
